zh.Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾克雷頓 煙雨 福利可利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Thies於1226年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，她的父親Baldwin Thies33歲，母親Margery de York31歲。她和John de Byron至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1290年在英國越可爾克雷頓 煙雨 福利可利享年64歲。

zh-hans.Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国越可爾克雷頓 煙雨 福利可利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Thies于1226年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓时，她的父亲Baldwin Thies33岁，母亲Margery de York31岁。她和John de Byron至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1290年在英国越可爾克雷頓 煙雨 福利可利享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thies
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Dutch: from a shortened form of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Thiessen
meanings: North German, Dutch, and Danish: patronymic from a shortened form Thies of the personal name Matthias or Mathies(s) (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Thies was born in 1226, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, her father, Baldwin Thies, was 33 and her mother, Margery de York, was 31. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with John de Byron. She died in 1290, in Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Thies est née en 1226, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Baldwin Thies, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery de York, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec John de Byron. Elle est décédée en 1290, à Clayton with Frickley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Thies 1226 in Clayton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baldwin Thies 33 und ihre Mutter Margery de York 31. Sie hatte mit John de Byron mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1290 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Thies è nata il nel 1226 nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Baldwin Thies, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margery de York, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con John de Byron. Morì nel 1290, nel Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Thiesが1226年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Baldwin Thiesは33歳，母Margery de Yorkは31歳であった。彼女はJohn de Byronとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクレイトン ウィス フリックリーで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Thies(이)가 1226년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baldwin Thies(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de York(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 John de Byron(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 요르크실르 클레이턴 위스 프릭리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Thies nasceu em 1226, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baldwin Thies, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery de York, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com John de Byron. Ela faleceu em 1290, em Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Thies родилась в 1226 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Baldwin Thies было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de York, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от John de Byron. Она умерла в 1290 г. в местности клеитон вит фриккли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Thies nació en 1226, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baldwin Thies, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery de York, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con John de Byron. Murió en 1290, en Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
